productDisplayName: French Connection Men Black & White Belt
description: Style Note An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This adjustable belt from French Connection is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Product Details Tang clasp with a fixed leather loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Leather coated patch on the tail end of the belt Brand logo embossed on a leather coated patch on the buckle Material and Care Polyester and leather coated Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine
